name: Low-Cal Carrot Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour a 3-quart tube pan.
3. In a mixing bowl, cream together the shortening, fructose, and eggs until light and lemon-colored.
4. Add remaining ingredients (except carrots and pecans) and beat well.
5. Stir in the carrots and pecans.
6. Pour batter into prepared pan and bake for 30-40 minutes.
This recipe makes 16 servings at 229 calories each.
